title: ESL AI Response Schema
description: Structured JSON response from Groq API (LLaMA 3.3-70B) for email security threat analysis

verdict.description: The overall security verdict for the analyzed email

indicators.description: List of specific red flags or indicators detected during analysis

recommendation.description: Actionable recommendation for the employee who forwarded the email
examples: Do not click any links. Delete the email immediately.
No action needed — this email appears safe.
Do not reply. Report to IT security team and forward as attachment.

operator_insights.description: Professional, free-text paragraph (2-4 sentences) suitable for inclusion in an official security response email

indicators: Sender address mismatch: displays as 'support@paypal.com' but originates from 'support-paypal.gq'
Urgency language: 'Your account will be suspended within 24 hours'
Suspicious link: 'https://paypal-verify.gq/login' resolves to non-PayPal IP
example.recommendation: Do not click any links. Delete the email immediately and do not reply.
example.operator_insights: Our analysis detected multiple indicators consistent with a phishing attack. The sender domain does not match legitimate PayPal infrastructure, the greeting is generic, and the link resolves to a known malicious domain. The email attempts to create urgency to bypass your judgment. This appears to be a targeted credential harvesting attempt.
